verdict.summary: Round 1's major finding is resolved. The test comment now limits its claim to the demonstrated Merkle root/path consistency property and explicitly states that the overall hidden-issuer ZK construction remains research-grade with external cryptographer audit pending sq-qhy4. The audit record is also synchronized to name key_set_root_sparse and document its dense-root equivalence. The regression test exercises the real KeySet::hidden_issuer_root path, compares sparse and dense roots at feasible depths, reconstructs every real member's deep sparse authentication path against the verifier-derived anchor, and retains the fail-closed depth check. No hostile reviewer-directed instruction appears in the diff.
